changelog:
- Automatic torch placement when light level is too low
- Movement-based activation (checks every 0.1 seconds while moving)
- Average light level calculation (3x3x3 area)
- Wall placement prioritized over ground placement
- Three placement modes: auto, wall-only, or ground-only
- Minimum distance between torches (default 8 blocks)
- Toggle on/off with K key (customizable)
- In-game status messages
- Dimension control (disabled in Nether by default)
- Fully configurable via config file
- Works with torches anywhere in inventory
